programme.title: Attitude
programme.desc: Tom Little was just five when he was diagnosed with ADHD. He struggled with social cues and felt isolated and frustrated. But his world changed when he met a teacher who welcomed his differences.
programme.series-desc: Immerse yourself in the engaging stories of people who live with a disability - ordinary people living extraordinary lives. Made with the support of NZ on Air.

programme.title: Tagata Pasifika
programme.desc: Tagata Pasifika is TVNZ's flagship Pacific news show, telling the stories of Pacific Islanders and its community. Made with the support of NZ on Air.
programme.series-desc: Tagata Pasifika is a news and current affairs show that specifically caters to New Zealand's Pacific Island community. With its own authentic voice, this show is made by Pacific people, for Pacific people.

programme.title: Songs Of Praise
programme.desc: Inspiring hymns and songs, together with uplifting stories of faith from around the UK and beyond.
programme.series-desc:
Songs of Praise is a BBC Television religious programme based around Christian hymns which began in October 1961. It is the most-watched British religious television programme.
The first edition was broadcast from the Tabernacle Baptist Church in Cardiff, and the series is the longest-running of its kind on television anywhere in the world.

programme.title: Origins
programme.desc: Season Premiere: Scotty Morrison explores the origins of the kūmara, which was brought to Aotearoa on waka by Māori across the Pacific Ocean.
programme.series-desc: Scotty Morrison explores the history of the Maori people.

programme.title: Q + A with Jack Tame
programme.desc: Hosted by Jack Tame, Q+A brings viewers the important political interviews and discussions of the week, taking a close look at politics, economics, and global events.
programme.series-desc: Join Jack Tame and the team and find the answers to the questions that matter. Made with the support of NZ on Air.

programme.title: Pathfinders
programme.desc: Master carver James Rickard takes us deeper into his gift, the people and life experiences that shaped him revealing the man behind the craft and one of our most prestigious carvers.
programme.series-desc:
During the second world war, the Pathfinder squadrons of RAF Bomber Command were the elite.
All volunteers, their dangerous task was to fly in advance of bombing raids over occupied Europe and Nazi Germany and "light up" the target with flares and incendiaries.

programme.title: Marae
programme.desc: Your way in to the Māori world and the issues that matter. Māiatanga, Whanaungatanga, Manaakitanga - We bring you stories with heart.
programme.series-desc: Your way in to the Māori world and the issues that matter. Māiatanga, Whanaungatanga, Manaakitanga - We bring you stories with heart.

programme.title: Interior Design Masters with Alan Carr
programme.sub-title: Interior Design Masters With Alan Carr
programme.desc: The designers pair up and hit East Grinstead high street to transform two Grade II listed shops. They need to transform the spaces to impress Mary queen of shops.
programme.series-desc: Alan Carr is back with a new batch of ten talented interior designers who will compete for a big break in the fast-paced world of commercial interior design.

programme.title: Attitude
programme.desc: Over 14,000 Kiwis are affected yearly by an acquired brain injury. In part three of My Fragile Brain, when Hayden and Nikita return home, they adjust everyday activities.
programme.series-desc: Immerse yourself in the engaging stories of people who live with a disability - ordinary people living extraordinary lives. Made with the support of NZ on Air.

programme.title: Find My Country House: Canada
programme.desc: Couples looking to relocate from the city find their perfect country house in a regional, Canadian location.
programme.series-desc: Take a serene outing into the Canadian countryside, as couples look to relocate from the city and find their perfect country house.

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Long-running soap following the ups and downs of village life amid the rolling scenery of the Yorkshire Dales.
programme.series-desc: The Yorkshire Dales have never been so scandalous. Follow the secrets, lies, loves and betrayals of life in Emmerdale.

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Long-running drama with the residents of England's most famous cobbled street.
programme.series-desc: Take a trip down the cobbles of Britain’s favourite street with express episodes from the UK.

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: Season Premiere: Several British families leave their homes in the UK to relocate to France in order to purchase and renovate abandoned chateaus to use them for business purposes. S7 E1
programme.series-desc: From derelict to delectable, meet courageous château-owners and the astonishing and underappreciated castles across France they are restoring!

programme.title: NZ Hunter Adventures
programme.desc: Greg and Willie split Sika roar teams between the Central North Island’s Kaweka and Kaimanawa forests. With a monster caught on trail camera, will their paths cross?
programme.series-desc: Greg and Willie Duley go on epic hunting adventures and showcase the magnificence of New Zealand's mountains and game animals.

programme.title: Love It or List It NZ
programme.desc: The Jensen whānau’s bungalow has them split! The outdated layout has triggered a battle between character and modern living.
programme.series-desc: The iconic property series hits our shores! Will Kiwi homeowners love it or list it when The Block NZ winner Alex Walls pitches a stunning renovation, while real estate agent Paul Glover offers a selection of greener pastures?

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: It's game on as teams of complete strangers work together to win money and try and defeat the Chaser, a ruthless quiz genius, who wants to leave them with nothing!
programme.series-desc: Answer a series of questions and walk off with a heap of cash. The only thing in these contestants' way is The Chaser, one of the finest brains in the world.

programme.title: 1News at Six
programme.desc: The nation's leading team of journalists brings viewers the latest news and sport, plus the most comprehensive weather report.
programme.series-desc: Join the 1News team as they bring you the latest news from here and overseas.

programme.title: Hyundai Country Calendar
programme.desc: A self-taught cheese maker and lover of goats milks her own herd, making artisan cheeses and sharing her knowledge through tours and cheese making classes.
programme.series-desc: Take a look at iconic rural Kiwi life in New Zealand's longest running television series! Made with the support of NZ on Air.

programme.title: Love It or List It NZ
programme.desc: The Monk whānau’s home has housed three generations and is now onto the fourth and is in original condition. Will Alex be able to echo the old, but bring in the new or will Paul tempt them?
programme.series-desc: The iconic property series hits our shores! Will Kiwi homeowners love it or list it when The Block NZ winner Alex Walls pitches a stunning renovation, while real estate agent Paul Glover offers a selection of greener pastures?

programme.title: My Life Is Murder
programme.desc: A custody battle over a cherished dog has ended in murder. Alexa’s investigation is complicated by the antics of her brother Will Crowe, who is tempted to return to his conman past. S5 E3
programme.series-desc: Lucy Lawless is back starring as razor-sharp investigator and unapologetic bad-ass Alexa Crowe, who has a knack for stirring up just the right kind of trouble to unravel even the most perplexing murders.

programme.title: Bergerac
programme.desc: A threatening letter sent to the Wakefields corroborates Bergerac's hunch that they have the wrong people in custody for Cate's murder leads to a new suspect hellbent on revenge. S1 E3
programme.series-desc:
Jim Bergerac is a detective sergeant in The Foreigners Office who likes to do things his own way.
While dealing with his own personal demons Bergerac has a knack of finding trouble, and sometimes causing it.

programme.title: Code Of Silence
programme.desc: Alison fears the police will discover her connection to Liam, but she has an opportunity to learn more when Liam invites her to London. S1 E2
programme.series-desc: A deaf catering worker who is struggling to make ends meet is called upon by a police detective superintendent to lip-read the conversations of criminals.

programme.title: Q+A With Jack Tame
programme.desc: Hosted by Jack Tame, Q+A brings viewers the important political interviews and discussions of the week, taking a close look at politics, economics, and global events.
programme.series-desc: Hosted by Jack Tame, Q + A brings viewers the important political interviews and discussions of the week, taking a closer look at politics, economics and global events.

programme.desc: Long-running drama with the residents of England's most famous cobbled street.

programme.title: Seven Sharp
programme.desc: Join Hilary Barry, Jeremy Wells and the team for a fresh perspective on today's stories.
programme.series-desc: Join Hilary Barry, Jeremy Wells and the team for a fresh perspective on today's stories.

programme.title: Eat Well For Less New Zealand
programme.desc: Season Finale: The Tonkin whānau need to upskill in the kitchen and they’re keen for the entire to work together on meal prep, but they’re not sure on where to start.
programme.series-desc: Chef Michael Van de Elzen and restaurateur Ganesh Raj are back helping Kiwi whānau trade in bad food habits and expensive branded products for cheaper, smarter, and healthier options! Made with the support of NZ On Air.

programme.title: Wonders of the Human Body
programme.sub-title: Michael Mosley's Wonders Of The Human Body
programme.desc: Michael demonstrates the effects of stress on the human body, meets a woman who learned to see again using echolocation and answers the age-old question about the composition of farts.
programme.series-desc: Take an incredible journey around the human body, revealing top tips for a healthy heart, a brand new test that can detect stroke risk and the secret of strong bones. Hosted by the late Michael Mosley.

programme.title: Would I Lie To You?
programme.desc: Rob Brydon, Lee Mack and David Mitchell return for another episode of previously unseen material from series 16, featuring Jo Brand, Tom Allen, Alice Roberts and Joe Wilkinson.
programme.series-desc: Rob Brydon hosts the brand new series of the award-winning comedy panel show. Celebrity guests reveal amazing stories about themselves, but are they telling the truth or making it all up?

programme.title: Hard Quiz
programme.desc: Tom Gleeson is back with the Big Brass Mug and four know-it-alls want it: an Australian Poetry afficionado, a disciple of Mahatma Gandhi, and fans of sci-fi TV show Stargate SG-1.
programme.series-desc: A parade of self-appointed experts take on Australia's grumpiest TV host, Tom Gleeson, in the ultimate test of smarts and resilience.

programme.title: Shortland Street
programme.desc: Maeve pulls back.
programme.series-desc: A fast-paced serial drama in an urban setting, this show explores the lives and loves of the patients and staff of a modern metropolitan hospital and contains a heady mix of medical crisis, human drama, comedy, romance and suspense. Follow the lives and loves of the residents of Ferndale, in New Zealand's longest-running drama.

programme.title: My Family Mystery
programme.desc: Marama has a big question mark surrounding her whakapapa, and uncovering the mystery sees her travelling across the globe.
programme.series-desc: Two of the UK's top criminal barristers, Sasha Wass and Jeremy Dein, explore historical murders where the convicted went to the gallows pleading their innocence. Investigating cases which bear all the hallmarks of a miscarriage of justice, they join forces with a living member of the convicted criminal’s family and a variety of specialist experts to re-examine the crime, evidence and trial.

programme.title: Accused: The Fake Grooming Scandal
programme.desc: Ellie Williams' false rape accusations have ripped Barrow apart. Tommy Robinson comes to town amid wildly escalating rumours. Ellie's arrested and a trial date is set.
programme.series-desc: Ellie Williams posts descriptions of rape at the hands of a local 'Asian grooming gang'. Mohammed Ramzan is named ringleader. The death threats begin. But is Ellie's story true?

programme.title: Lotto
programme.desc: Takashi Sorimachi stars as Satoru Tachibana, an advertising firm employee slaving away under a younger boss for a meager salary. With a pachinko habit, no savings, and no prospects of romance since his divorce, Tachibana is left wondering what the future holds for him. One day, he desperately enters a lottery, trying to make enough money to pay for his child support, but his sense of self-disgust kicks in. However, his curiosity gets the better of him, and he later discovers that the ticket is a winner, turning him into a millionaire overnight. --Tokyograph

programme.title: Beat The Chasers Continued
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh hosts as the Sensational Six - The Sinnerman, The Beast, The Governess, The Menace, The Vixen and The Dark Destroyer - come together to take on Jane, Jonathan, and more.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Meet Bluey, an inexhaustible six-year-old Blue Heeler dog who loves to play. She turns everyday family life into extraordinary adventures!
programme.series-desc: Bluey is an over enthusiastic and imaginative six-year-old Blue Heeler puppy, who goes on adventures with her younger sister, Bingo, which unfolds in hilarious ways. Everyday family life turns into an extraordinary adventure.

programme.title: Moley
programme.desc: The adventures of an optimistic and charming young mole in his underground home beneath Windsor Castle.
programme.series-desc: The adventures of an optimistic and charming young mole in his underground home beneath Windsor Castle.

programme.title: The Jungle Bunch To The Rescue!
programme.desc: The jungle can be a dangerous place... but thankfully there are a group of heroes ready to defend those in trouble. Join the Jungle Bunch as they rush to the rescue of their animal friends!
programme.series-desc: Maurice, a penguin raised in the jungle who thinks he is a tiger, leads a group of misfit animals on missions to rescue their fellow animals, no matter what their trouble is.

programme.title: Scooby Doo! Guess Who
programme.desc: The team is back and just as courageous, adventurous, humorous & obsessed with cases like before. They are joined by celebrities in their adventures and ghost hunts and in search of puzzles to solve.
programme.series-desc: The Mystery Inc. gang solve bigger mysteries while also encountering many memorable celebrities.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir
programme.sub-title: Strikeback: Shadow Moth's Final Attack Part 1
programme.desc: Marinette and Adrien look like regular teenagers, usually. But together they are Ladybug and Cat Noir, the heroes that protect Paris from the evil Hawk Moth!
programme.series-desc: Marinette and Adrien look like regular teenagers, usually. But together they are Ladybug and Cat Noir, the heroes that protect Paris from the evil Hawk Moth!

programme.title: What Now?
programme.desc: Come and join the party! Catch Aashma, Chris, Imy, Manu and Rahil for gunge, cream pies, challenges, epic fails and adventures across Aotearoa! Haere mai ki te whare o te hūwareware!
programme.series-desc: Come and join the party! Catch Aashma, Chris, Imy, Manu and Rahil for gunge, cream pies, challenges, epic fails and adventures across Aotearoa! Haere mai ki te whare o te hūwareware! Made with the support of NZ on Air.

programme.title: The Voice USA
programme.desc: Coaches Michael Bublé, Snoop Dogg, Reba McEntire and Gwen Stefani all vie to discover and coach the next singing phenomenon on the third night of blind auditions.
programme.series-desc: The competition is fierce as country duo Dan + Shay claim their double chair; alongside coaches Chance the Rapper, John Legend and Reba McEntire, they all vie to discover and coach the next singing phenomenon.

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Cohen’s world is turned upside down. Mackenzie and Levi receive good news. Harper delivers a tough truth.
programme.series-desc: The water's warm and the drama's even hotter! Don't miss the latest from the guys and girls in Summer Bay.

programme.title: Don't Forget The Lyrics
programme.sub-title: I Just Want To Be Sure That You Are Sure...
programme.desc: A high school teacher and a mum from Las Vegas try to sing their way to $1 million.
programme.series-desc: Contestants' musical memory is challenged, as they get one song closer to winning $1 million if they "Don't Forget the Lyrics!" Contestants choose songs from different genres, decades and musical artists. Then they take center stage to sing alongside the studio band as the lyrics are projected on screen -- but when the music stops and the words disappear, the contestants must belt out the correct missing lyrics. If they sing nine songs correctly, they are presented with a No. 1 hit and attempt to sing the final missing lyrics for the top prize of $1 million.

programme.title: MKR
programme.desc: The competition continues in Adelaide, where young mums Ash and Cassie hope to impress the judges with their healthy Asian-inspired meals.
programme.series-desc: My Kitchen Rules is an Australian competitive cooking game show broadcast on the Seven Network since 2010. The series is produced by the team who created the Seven reality show My Restaurant Rules, and was put into production based on the success of Network Ten's MasterChef Australia. My Kitchen Rules has just been renewed by the Seven Network for a fifth series.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly insists on chaperoning when Dana and Adam go to their first school dance together; Murray decides to talk about the birds and the bees with Barry. S1 E14
programme.series-desc: Before there were parenting blogs, trophies for showing up, and peanut allergies, there was a simpler time called the '80s. For geeky 11-year old Adam these were his wonder years and he faced them armed with a video camera to capture all the crazy. The Goldbergs are a loving family like any other, just with a lot more yelling.

programme.title: Madagascar
programme.desc: Animated film in which four spoiled animals from the New York Central Zoo escape with the unintentional help of four fugitive penguins. (2005)
programme.series-desc: Alex the lion is the king of the urban jungle, the main attraction at New York's Central Park Zoo. He and his best friends—Marty the zebra, Melman the giraffe and Gloria the hippo—have spent their whole lives in blissful captivity before an admiring public and with regular meals provided for them. Not content to leave well enough alone, Marty lets his curiosity get the better of him and makes his escape—with the help of some prodigious penguins—to explore the world.

programme.title: Two And A Half Men
programme.sub-title: Slowly And In A Circular Fashion
programme.desc: When Walden's ex-wife and his mother try to take control of his company and vote him off the board, Walden enlists Alan as an ally in the boardroom battle. S9 E13
programme.series-desc: The men are back - and this time they're getting the DUKE treatment. Go back to the start with Charlie Sheen in Two And A Half Men.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard, Penny and Raj adjust to their new living arrangement, and amazingly, Sheldon takes an interest in Amy’s work! S10 E19
programme.series-desc: Leonard and Sheldon are brilliant physicists, but none of that genius helps them interact with people, especially women. All this begins to change when a free-spirited beauty named Penny moves in next door.

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: A night time dog walk turns into crash chaos as a woman flips her car after walking in the park with her pet. Police officers respond to what seems an entire street blocked off due to the incident.
programme.series-desc: For action from all directions, ride along with the police officers who monitor Australia's busy highways.

programme.title: Gladiators Celebrity Special
programme.desc: Bradley and Barney Walsh host a special edition of the iconic series which sees celebrities Rob Beckett, Joel Dommett, Louise Minchin and Ellie Taylor take on the Gladiators.

programme.title: The Hitman's Body Guard
programme.desc: A "boring is best" bodyguard must ensure a star witness -- who happens to be a volatile assassin -- stays alive to testify against a brutal dictator. Stars Samuel L. Jackson & Ryan Reynolds. (2017)

programme.title: Watson
programme.desc: Stephens musters the courage to ask Watson to help him when his camgirl suddenly collapses during a video call. S1 E6
programme.series-desc: A year after the death of his friend and partner Sherlock Holmes at the hands of Moriarty, Dr. John Watson resumes his medical career as the head of a clinic dedicated to treating rare disorders. However, he soon finds that his old life is not done with him yet.

programme.title: FBI: International
programme.desc: When an American student is found dead at a prestigious U.K. university, the Fly Team investigates an infamous secret society. S4 E11
programme.series-desc: Follows the elite agents of the FBI's International Fly Team headquartered in Budapest as they travel the world with the mission of protecting Americans wherever they may be.

programme.title: SEAL Team
programme.desc: Lieutenant Davis and Captain Walsh send BRAVO to Thailand to partner with the DEA on a joint-task force focused on the fentanyl trade. S7 E3
programme.series-desc: An elite unit of Navy SEALs balance their personal and professional lives as they train, plan and execute high-stakes missions, ready to be deployed worldwide at a moment's notice.

programme.title: Dr Death: The Undoctored Story
programme.desc: The terrifying true story of Dr. Christopher Duntsch, a notorious neurosurgeon who left 33 of his patients maimed, paralysed or dead.
programme.series-desc: A docuseries chronicling two doctors' attempts to stop Dr. Christopher Duntsch, a seemingly brilliant, charming and ambitious neurosurgeon who aimed his scalpel at the citizens of Texas and left many patients maimed, paralyzed or dead.

programme.title: Killerpost
programme.desc: Sometimes social media can be deadly. In this shocking true crime series, experts and eyewitnesses reveal sinister cases where online interactions led to real-life murder.
programme.series-desc: Extreme examples of the negative outcomes that can result from social media usage. Episodes tell the stories of cases in which social media activity had dangerous -- sometimes deadly -- consequences.

programme.title: Kiri and Lou
programme.desc: Kiri and Lou follows the adventures of Kiri, a feisty little dinosaur with overpowering emotions, and Lou, a gentle but thoughtful creature. Follow the friendship of these two prehistoric creatures.
programme.series-desc: Kiri is a feisty little dinosaur with overpowering emotions, and Lou is a gentle, thoughtful purple creature. In their prehistoric forest, the pair invite children to learn about empathy, kindness, and the meaning of true friendship.

programme.title: Toi Time
programme.desc: Featuring Anika Moa and her music, educating and entertaining kids through play, movement and dance.
programme.series-desc: A car accident is the reason why Lu Miao suddenly has a new older brother, Jiang Hao Yue. Lu Miao practices various martial arts and becomes the female knight to Jiang Hao Yue, the fallen prince. Similarly, Jiang Hao Yue stands by Lu Miao to guard her in his own way. For Lu Miao, Jiang Hao Yue is the moonlight that she has spent her entire youth chasing after, but the moon gets its light from the sun. Without her knowing, she became the sun that illuminates Jiang Hao Yue's whole world. As Lu Miao enters high school and makes new friends, she gradually realizes that her feelings for Jiang Hao Yue go beyond that of siblings. Shi Che's arrival brings upon a strong sense of unease for Jiang Hao Yue. Soon enough, the brother and sisterly love evolves into young love.

programme.title: The Tom and Jerry Show
programme.desc: The gang get more than they bargained for when the dog next door shows up.
programme.series-desc: Tom, a not-too-smart house cat, embarks on his adventure of persistently pursuing his never-ending quest of nabbing a notorious and very cheeky mouse, Jerry.

programme.title: Beyblade X
programme.desc: Four beybladers and their genius friend travel the world as team 'Bladebreakers' to win a championship, realising there's much more at stake on the go.
programme.series-desc: Beginner blader Robin Kazami joins up with influencer Multi Nana-iro and former champion Jaxon Cross to form this unlikely trio - ready to climb to the top of The X and win the title of champion blader!

programme.title: Brain Busters
programme.desc: Kiwi kids compete in a series of increasingly tricky challenges involving maths, memory, spelling and more – working towards the ultimate test of smarts and stamina, the Brain Buster!
programme.series-desc: Kiwis compete in a series of increasingly tricky challenges involving maths, memory, spelling and more - working towards the ultimate test of smarts and stamina, the Brain Buster! Made with the support of NZ On Air.

programme.title: Kangaroo Beach
programme.desc: Welcome to Kangaroo Beach - a dazzling Aussie paradise and home to four furry, super-keen, young lifeguard cadets.

programme.title: Charles Stanley
programme.desc: Infomercials
programme.series-desc: In Touch with Dr. Charles Stanley is a television series sponsored by In Touch Ministries in Atlanta, Georgia and hosted by Charles Stanley. The series airs on the Trinity Broadcasting Network and began airing in 1990. On one episode dated September 11, 2011, it hosted a 10th anniversary remembrance of the terrorist attacks on the September 11 attacks, which featured stories of those who survived the attack.

programme.title: Turning Point
programme.desc: Infomercials
programme.series-desc:
Turning Point is an ABC News program that aired from 1994 to 1999.
Turning Point was an hour-long documentary program focused on a single topic, making it similar to CBS' 48 Hours, which it ran directly opposite for some of its run. The program tended toward sensational topics, such as former members of Charles Manson's "Family" and much coverage of the O. J. Simpson murder case, which was current for much of the program's run. ABC News figures appearing regularly on the program included Diane Sawyer, Forrest Sawyer, Meredith Vieira, Peter Jennings and Barbara Walters.
This Turning Point is not to be confused with an ABC dramatic anthology series of the same title which ran during the 1952-53 television season.

programme.title: Getaway
programme.desc: This week on Getaway, Catriona Rowntree continues her European river journey with a side trip to Cesky Krumlov before cruising through Southern Germany.
programme.series-desc:
Getaway is Australia's longest-running travel television program. Debuting on 14 May 1992, it is broadcast on the Nine Network and TLC. Its main competitor was The Great Outdoors on the Seven Network until 2009.
A New Zealand version of the program, with some local content, used to be broadcast on TV One and Prime TV.
The first season only looked at only Australian resorts and locations, but by 1993 had expanded to look at overseas destinations.

programme.title: 24 Hours In Emergency
programme.desc: Cameras film around the clock in some of Britain's busiest A&E departments, where stories of life, love and loss unfold every day
programme.series-desc:
Dr. Shindo seems cold, but is a competent surgeon. He is also an ER doctor capable of accurate decisions and treatment, who always tries to see things from the patient’s side. Although once retired from his profession, he one day discovers someone in need of help, who he treats and rushes to the Kohoku Medical University Emergency Center. This incident encourages him to once again work as an ER doctor. Confrontation erupts between female doctor Tamaki, and Shindo, now a just-arrived ER doctor.
While this human drama depicts the relationships among doctors and nurses, it appeals emotionally to viewers on the subject of life.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disasters
programme.desc: On 31 October 2015, Metrojet Flight 9268 disintegrates in mid-air and crashes into the Sinai Peninsula during a routine chartered flight, killing all 224 people on board.
programme.series-desc: Major real-life air disasters are depicted in this series. Each episode features a detailed dramatized reconstruction of the incident based on cockpit voice recorders and air traffic control transcripts, as well as eyewitnesses recounts and interviews with aviation experts.

programme.title: Tales From Zambia
programme.desc: Explore Zambia's diverse wildlife, from majestic elephants to playful baboons, through this captivating collection. Venture into breathtaking habitats and witness fascinating animal behaviours. (R)
programme.series-desc: Zambia is home to some of the world’s most exotic wildlife. From elephants to eagles and baboons to hippos, this collection of films features a range of different species, exploring their fascinating behaviour and taking viewers on a virtual safari into some of the wildest and most beautiful habitats on Earth.

programme.title: Hunt With Me
programme.desc: Amber Smith and Josh Timms head out of Whangārei on the hunt for snapper, while Gavin Wairau flies into theÂ Kaweka Ranges in search of the elusiveÂ sikaÂ deer. (R)

programme.title: Hunting Aotearoa

programme.title: Takaro Tribe
programme.desc: Takaro Tribe is an animated series for 0-6 year olds. We follow our cute characters as they enter the magical Alphabet Forest where our talking Papa Rakau, Pond Koka, Pu and Waea Wao live.
programme.series-desc: The Tākaro Tribe is a whānau (family) of five cute, cuddly and friendly patupaiarehe (woodland fairies) who live in the enchanted and magical Wao Arapū (alphabet forest). Their names are A, E, I, O, U and they are sisters and brothers. In the forest, also lives their much loved Pāpā Rākau (Tree Father) and Kōkā (Pond Mother) along with many special animal and bird friends.

programme.title: Island of Mystery
programme.desc: While Kura, Josh and Kazumi follow a trail of maero footprints, Rangi is playing games with rangatira o patupaiarehe on top of the misty maunga. (R)
programme.series-desc: Flone and her family were on their way to Australia from Switzerland when their ship wrecked and they landed on an inhabited island. Relying on a strong conviction that they will return one day, the Family Robinson made a house on top of a tree and live on whatever resources available to them. Through the cooperation of each and every member, the family managed to survive on the island and eventually did return back to Australia.

programme.title: Wild City
programme.desc: We follow two otter families and encounter macaques, pythons, stingrays, and other creatures battling to survive and learning to flourish in the waterways of Singapore. (R)
programme.series-desc:
Singapore: One of the fastest growing cities in the world. Once a tropical jungle, it is now 665 square kilometres of hustle, bustle, concrete and air-con. But nestled among the urban sprawl there is a wild side; - places where pangolins, crocodiles, monkeys, otters, snakes and hornbills sit right among the skyscrapers and boardwalks.
This series, narrated by Sir David Attenborough, discovers how nature has evolved within this teeming city.
Wild City showcases the range of different habitats found in and around the built-up urban sprawl, then journeys around the island’s hidden wildlife hotspots – from the overlooked interior to the inaccessible coastline and islands that have become unplanned sanctuaries for Singapore’s natural heritage.

programme.series-desc: Katniss Everdeen has returned home safe after winning the 74th Annual Hunger Games along with fellow tribute Peeta Mellark. Winning means that they must turn around and leave their family and close friends, embarking on a "Victor's Tour" of the districts. Along the way Katniss senses that a rebellion is simmering, but the Capitol is still very much in control as President Snow prepares the 75th Annual Hunger Games (The Quarter Quell) - a competition that could change Panem forever.

programme.series-desc: An unrivalled and highly elusive lone assassin, the Jackal, makes his living carrying out hits for the highest fee. But following his latest kill, he meets his match in a tenacious British intelligence officer who starts to track down the Jackal in a thrilling cat-and-mouse chase across Europe, leaving destruction in its wake.

programme.desc: When a skateboarder dodges a young child playing in a Louisiana skate park, he takes out his frustrations on the kid’s parents.
programme.series-desc: With a record number of Americans trading city life for homes in the suburbs, relationships between neighbors are being put to the test. “Neighborhood Wars” takes viewers into the homes and backyards of neighbors across the country with some of the most unexpected and emotionally charged events caught on camera. Featuring footage from cell phones, drones, home security cameras and more, the series showcases the kindness and conflict between real-life neighbors throughout the US.

programme.title: Customer Wars
programme.desc: In Philadelphia, a disruptive passenger is removed from an aeroplane; a fight breaks out at a local bar in Hill City, S.D.; football fans heading to a match in West Sussex, England race against the cl
programme.series-desc: With supply chain shortages, prices skyrocketing and more shoplifting than ever before, positive customer relations are nearly impossible. “Customer Wars” spotlights the conflicts that arise when disgruntled and irrational customers come face-to-face with the employees doing their best to take care of their needs. From fiery exchanges at the fast-food drive thru to loss-prevention brawls, this series proves once and for all that “The customer is always right” is the exception rather than the rule.

programme.title: Don't Forget The Lyrics
programme.sub-title: I Just Want To Be Sure That You Are Sure...
programme.desc: A high school teacher and a mum from Las Vegas try to sing their way to $1 million.
programme.series-desc: Contestants' musical memory is challenged, as they get one song closer to winning $1 million if they "Don't Forget the Lyrics!" Contestants choose songs from different genres, decades and musical artists. Then they take center stage to sing alongside the studio band as the lyrics are projected on screen -- but when the music stops and the words disappear, the contestants must belt out the correct missing lyrics. If they sing nine songs correctly, they are presented with a No. 1 hit and attempt to sing the final missing lyrics for the top prize of $1 million.

programme.title: MKR

My Kitchen Rules has just been renewed by the Seven Network for a fifth series.

programme.desc: Animated film in which four spoiled animals from the New York Central Zoo escape with the unintentional help of four fugitive penguins. (2005)
programme.series-desc: Alex the lion is the king of the urban jungle, the main attraction at New York's Central Park Zoo. He and his best friends—Marty the zebra, Melman the giraffe and Gloria the hippo—have spent their whole lives in blissful captivity before an admiring public and with regular meals provided for them. Not content to leave well enough alone, Marty lets his curiosity get the better of him and makes his escape—with the help of some prodigious penguins—to explore the world.

programme.desc: Featuring Anika Moa and her music, educating and entertaining kids through play, movement and dance.
programme.series-desc: A car accident is the reason why Lu Miao suddenly has a new older brother, Jiang Hao Yue. Lu Miao practices various martial arts and becomes the female knight to Jiang Hao Yue, the fallen prince. Similarly, Jiang Hao Yue stands by Lu Miao to guard her in his own way. For Lu Miao, Jiang Hao Yue is the moonlight that she has spent her entire youth chasing after, but the moon gets its light from the sun. Without her knowing, she became the sun that illuminates Jiang Hao Yue's whole world. As Lu Miao enters high school and makes new friends, she gradually realizes that her feelings for Jiang Hao Yue go beyond that of siblings. Shi Che's arrival brings upon a strong sense of unease for Jiang Hao Yue. Soon enough, the brother and sisterly love evolves into young love.

programme.title: Toi Time
programme.desc: Featuring Anika Moa and her music, educating and entertaining kids through play, movement and dance.
programme.series-desc: A car accident is the reason why Lu Miao suddenly has a new older brother, Jiang Hao Yue. Lu Miao practices various martial arts and becomes the female knight to Jiang Hao Yue, the fallen prince. Similarly, Jiang Hao Yue stands by Lu Miao to guard her in his own way. For Lu Miao, Jiang Hao Yue is the moonlight that she has spent her entire youth chasing after, but the moon gets its light from the sun. Without her knowing, she became the sun that illuminates Jiang Hao Yue's whole world. As Lu Miao enters high school and makes new friends, she gradually realizes that her feelings for Jiang Hao Yue go beyond that of siblings. Shi Che's arrival brings upon a strong sense of unease for Jiang Hao Yue. Soon enough, the brother and sisterly love evolves into young love.

programme.title: Salvage Hunters
programme.desc: Modern day treasure hunter Drew Pritchard travels the length and breadth of the UK in search of weird and wonderful objects. The bigger the hoard, the happier he is.
programme.series-desc: Meet modern-day treasure hunter Drew Pritchard. With demanding customers, high turnover, and one of the biggest decorative salvage yards in the UK, Drew is constantly on the road, crisscrossing the country in search of derelict gems and forgotten remnants. Drew loves the thrill of the hunt and while he gets his hands dirty in the country's architectural backwaters, his crack team of restorers is back at the shop giving old and rare finds a new lease on life.

programme.title: Toy Hunter
programme.desc: Jordan sets his sights on Knoxville, Tennessee, to replenish his inventory. S1 E9
programme.series-desc: Toy Hunter is an American reality documentary television series on the Travel Channel that debuted August 15, 2012. The series encompasses the exploits of Jordan Hembrough, a toy dealer, who takes toy picking to a new level as he visits collections from some of the most popular cities on the East and West Coasts. In September 2012, Travel Channel announced the series' renewal for a second season, which consists of thirteen episodes. It airs in the United Kingdom and Ireland on Quest.

programme.title: Border Security
programme.desc: A suspicious package arrives at the mail centre from India, and an American surfer is taken ill in customs. Plus, an Indonesian family is carrying an unwanted visitor. S4 Ep4
programme.series-desc: The work of Australia's customs and immigration officials who protect their country from drug smugglers, illegal immigrants, potential terrorists, harmful pests and exotic diseases.

programme.title: Border Security
programme.desc: Australian border control agents monitor 20,000 travellers entering Australia each day. They protect the country from all kinds of threats, from smugglers to exotic diseases.
programme.series-desc: The work of Australia's customs and immigration officials who protect their country from drug smugglers, illegal immigrants, potential terrorists, harmful pests and exotic diseases.

programme.series-desc: 999: On the Front Line returns for a second series following the paramedic teams of the West Midlands Ambulance Service.

programme.title: Border Security
programme.desc: A suspicious package arrives at the mail centre from India, and an American surfer is taken ill in customs. Plus, an Indonesian family is carrying an unwanted visitor. S4 Ep4
programme.series-desc: The work of Australia's customs and immigration officials who protect their country from drug smugglers, illegal immigrants, potential terrorists, harmful pests and exotic diseases.

programme.title: Border Security Australia
programme.desc: Australian border control agents monitor 20,000 travellers entering Australia each day. They protect the country from all kinds of threats, from smugglers to exotic diseases.
programme.series-desc:
Border Security: Australia's Front Line is an Australian television program that airs on the Seven Network. The show follows the work of officers of Australian Customs and Border Protection, the Australian Quarantine and Inspection Service, and the Department of Immigration and Citizenship as they enforce Australian customs, quarantine, immigration and finance laws.
Most of the programme is filmed at Sydney and Melbourne airports. Occasionally, the program features other locations such as Brisbane Airport, Perth Airport, seaports, international mail centres, raids on workplaces suspected of employing persons contrary to the restrictions of their visa or immigrant status and the work of Customs vessels and aircraft in the waters of Northern Australia.

programme.title: Paramedics: On The Front Line

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: Anne Burrell and Damaris Phillips team up to hassle, heckle and hope Bobby loses. They bring in Italian master chefs Ayaka Guido and Fabrizio Facchini.
programme.series-desc: Two talented chefs go head-to-head for the chance to Beat Bobby Flay. programme.title: The Red King
programme.desc: With the True Way falsely accused of Cai's murder, Grace's investigation is blown
programme.series-desc: Smart, capable and by the book Grace Narayan was flying high as an inner-city police sergeant before being forced into a 'punishment posting' on the small, antiquated island of St. Jory. Confronted by the forgotten and unsolved case of missing teenage boy Cai, Grace quickly discovers that she must overcome scarce evidence, extraordinary local characters, and the island's strange cult history to uncover the truth.

programme.title: 24 Hours In Emergency
programme.desc: Cameras film around the clock in some of Britain's busiest A&E departments, where stories of life, love and loss unfold every day
programme.series-desc:
Dr. Shindo seems cold, but is a competent surgeon. He is also an ER doctor capable of accurate decisions and treatment, who always tries to see things from the patient’s side. Although once retired from his profession, he one day discovers someone in need of help, who he treats and rushes to the Kohoku Medical University Emergency Center. This incident encourages him to once again work as an ER doctor. Confrontation erupts between female doctor Tamaki, and Shindo, now a just-arrived ER doctor.
While this human drama depicts the relationships among doctors and nurses, it appeals emotionally to viewers on the subject of life.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disasters
programme.desc: On 31 October 2015, Metrojet Flight 9268 disintegrates in mid-air and crashes into the Sinai Peninsula during a routine chartered flight, killing all 224 people on board.
programme.series-desc: Major real-life air disasters are depicted in this series. Each episode features a detailed dramatized reconstruction of the incident based on cockpit voice recorders and air traffic control transcripts, as well as eyewitnesses recounts and interviews with aviation experts.

programme.series-desc: This locally made series introduces New Zealanders to the places and faces behind our agricultural sector.

programme.title: Country House Hunters

programme.series-desc: Escape the hustle and bustle of city life, with Australian home-buyers looking for a lifestyle change. From quaint farmhouses to luxury mountain estates, take a tour of some beautiful Australian countryside.

programme.title: Attitude
programme.desc: Tom Little was just five when he was diagnosed with ADHD. He struggled with social cues and felt isolated and frustrated. But his world changed when he met a teacher who welcomed his differences.
programme.series-desc: Immerse yourself in the engaging stories of people who live with a disability - ordinary people living extraordinary lives. Made with the support of NZ on Air.

programme.title: Tagata Pasifika
programme.desc: Tagata Pasifika is TVNZ's flagship Pacific news show, telling the stories of Pacific Islanders and its community. Made with the support of NZ on Air.
programme.series-desc: Tagata Pasifika is a news and current affairs show that specifically caters to New Zealand's Pacific Island community. With its own authentic voice, this show is made by Pacific people, for Pacific people.

programme.title: Songs Of Praise
programme.desc: Inspiring hymns and songs, together with uplifting stories of faith from around the UK and beyond.
programme.series-desc:
Songs of Praise is a BBC Television religious programme based around Christian hymns which began in October 1961. It is the most-watched British religious television programme.
The first edition was broadcast from the Tabernacle Baptist Church in Cardiff, and the series is the longest-running of its kind on television anywhere in the world.

programme.title: Origins

programme.series-desc: Scotty Morrison explores the history of the Maori people.

programme.title: Q + A with Jack Tame
programme.desc: Hosted by Jack Tame, Q+A brings viewers the important political interviews and discussions of the week, taking a close look at politics, economics, and global events.
programme.series-desc: Join Jack Tame and the team and find the answers to the questions that matter. Made with the support of NZ on Air.

programme.title: Pathfinders
programme.desc: Master carver James Rickard takes us deeper into his gift, the people and life experiences that shaped him revealing the man behind the craft and one of our most prestigious carvers.
programme.series-desc:
During the second world war, the Pathfinder squadrons of RAF Bomber Command were the elite.
All volunteers, their dangerous task was to fly in advance of bombing raids over occupied Europe and Nazi Germany and "light up" the target with flares and incendiaries.

programme.title: Marae
programme.desc: Your way in to the Māori world and the issues that matter. Māiatanga, Whanaungatanga, Manaakitanga - We bring you stories with heart.
programme.series-desc: Your way in to the Māori world and the issues that matter. Māiatanga, Whanaungatanga, Manaakitanga - We bring you stories with heart.

programme.sub-title: Interior Design Masters With Alan Carr

programme.series-desc: Alan Carr is back with a new batch of ten talented interior designers who will compete for a big break in the fast-paced world of commercial interior design.

programme.title: Attitude

programme.desc: Couples looking to relocate from the city find their perfect country house in a regional, Canadian location.
programme.series-desc: Take a serene outing into the Canadian countryside, as couples look to relocate from the city and find their perfect country house.

programme.desc: Long-running soap following the ups and downs of village life amid the rolling scenery of the Yorkshire Dales.

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: Season Premiere: Several British families leave their homes in the UK to relocate to France in order to purchase and renovate abandoned chateaus to use them for business purposes. S7 E1
programme.series-desc: From derelict to delectable, meet courageous château-owners and the astonishing and underappreciated castles across France they are restoring!

programme.title: NZ Hunter Adventures
programme.desc: Greg and Willie split Sika roar teams between the Central North Island’s Kaweka and Kaimanawa forests. With a monster caught on trail camera, will their paths cross?
programme.series-desc: Greg and Willie Duley go on epic hunting adventures and showcase the magnificence of New Zealand's mountains and game animals.

programme.title: Love It or List It NZ
programme.desc: The Jensen whānau’s bungalow has them split! The outdated layout has triggered a battle between character and modern living.
programme.series-desc: The iconic property series hits our shores! Will Kiwi homeowners love it or list it when The Block NZ winner Alex Walls pitches a stunning renovation, while real estate agent Paul Glover offers a selection of greener pastures?

programme.title: Hyundai Country Calendar
programme.desc: A self-taught cheese maker and lover of goats milks her own herd, making artisan cheeses and sharing her knowledge through tours and cheese making classes.
programme.series-desc: Take a look at iconic rural Kiwi life in New Zealand's longest running television series! Made with the support of NZ on Air.

programme.title: Love It or List It NZ
programme.desc: The Monk whānau’s home has housed three generations and is now onto the fourth and is in original condition. Will Alex be able to echo the old, but bring in the new or will Paul tempt them?
programme.series-desc: The iconic property series hits our shores! Will Kiwi homeowners love it or list it when The Block NZ winner Alex Walls pitches a stunning renovation, while real estate agent Paul Glover offers a selection of greener pastures?

programme.title: My Life Is Murder
programme.desc: A custody battle over a cherished dog has ended in murder. Alexa’s investigation is complicated by the antics of her brother Will Crowe, who is tempted to return to his conman past. S5 E3
programme.series-desc: Lucy Lawless is back starring as razor-sharp investigator and unapologetic bad-ass Alexa Crowe, who has a knack for stirring up just the right kind of trouble to unravel even the most perplexing murders.

programme.title: Bergerac
programme.desc: A threatening letter sent to the Wakefields corroborates Bergerac's hunch that they have the wrong people in custody for Cate's murder leads to a new suspect hellbent on revenge. S1 E3
programme.series-desc:
Jim Bergerac is a detective sergeant in The Foreigners Office who likes to do things his own way.
While dealing with his own personal demons Bergerac has a knack of finding trouble, and sometimes causing it.

programme.title: Code Of Silence
programme.desc: Alison fears the police will discover her connection to Liam, but she has an opportunity to learn more when Liam invites her to London. S1 E2
programme.series-desc: A deaf catering worker who is struggling to make ends meet is called upon by a police detective superintendent to lip-read the conversations of criminals.

programme.title: Q+A With Jack Tame

programme.desc: Season Finale: The Tonkin whānau need to upskill in the kitchen and they’re keen for the entire to work together on meal prep, but they’re not sure on where to start.

programme.title: Wonders of the Human Body
programme.sub-title: Michael Mosley's Wonders Of The Human Body
programme.desc: Michael demonstrates the effects of stress on the human body, meets a woman who learned to see again using echolocation and answers the age-old question about the composition of farts.

programme.title: Emmerdale

programme.series-desc: The Yorkshire Dales have never been so scandalous. Follow the secrets, lies, loves and betrayals of life in Emmerdale.

programme.title: Lotto
programme.desc: Takashi Sorimachi stars as Satoru Tachibana, an advertising firm employee slaving away under a younger boss for a meager salary. With a pachinko habit, no savings, and no prospects of romance since his divorce, Tachibana is left wondering what the future holds for him. One day, he desperately enters a lottery, trying to make enough money to pay for his child support, but his sense of self-disgust kicks in. However, his curiosity gets the better of him, and he later discovers that the ticket is a winner, turning him into a millionaire overnight. --Tokyograph
programme.series-desc: Takashi Sorimachi stars as Satoru Tachibana, an advertising firm employee slaving away under a younger boss for a meager salary. programme.title: Beat The Chasers Continued
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh hosts as the Sensational Six - The Sinnerman, The Beast, The Governess, The Menace, The Vixen and The Dark Destroyer - come together to take on Jane, Jonathan, and more.

programme.title: On Duke Today...
programme.desc: Here's what's on DUKE today.

programme.title: The Chase Australia
programme.desc: Australian version of the critically acclaimed game show. Four strangers work individually and as a team to build a cashpot. Standing in their way is the Chaser, one of the world's top trivia brains.
programme.series-desc: Some of the greatest quiz minds take on everyday hopefuls in the Aussie version of the hit UK game show.

programme.title: Heavy Rescue 401
programme.sub-title: Take Your Time But Hurry Up
programme.desc: When a transport rolls on a dangerous curve, John Campbell needs to master his new rotator in a hurry; Duncan Cooper and crew take on a full load of medical supplies dumped on the side of the highway.
programme.series-desc: The heavy recovery operators of Southern Ontario fight to keep the busiest stretch of highway in the world clear and safe in all weather.

programme.title: Gem Hunters Down Under
programme.desc: Rowan Richardson drills up a lot more than he bargained for. Anthony and Jodie Mifsud try to join tunnels while Old Timers Ray and Paul realize too late, an old mine hides a deadly secret. S1 E3
programme.series-desc: Sapphire hunters chase the high of finding some of the largest gems on the planet in the extreme conditions of the Central Queensland gem fields.

programme.title: MythBusters: There's Your Problem!
programme.desc: The MythBusters dive into a liquid world of H2O high-jinks, as well as put weather-related questions to the test. S2 E5
programme.series-desc: With handpicked myths from the depths of the MythBusters archives, take a deeper dive to find out everything you ever wanted to know about water, gravity, velocity and more!

programme.title: Curse Of Oak Island
programme.desc: The Laginas are poised to solve the 226-year mystery of Oak Island, working in the Money Pit area to find the "Garhardt dump truck load" of silver.
programme.series-desc: Follow brothers Marty and Rick Lagina through their effort to find the speculated - and as of yet undiscovered - buried treasure believed to have been concealed through extraordinary means on Oak Island.

programme.title: Swamp People
programme.desc: An unexpected cold front threatens Troy and Pickle's season, Jacob and Don shoot their way out of a tough spot, Joey and Zach use an old school trick to get gators to bite.
programme.series-desc: In the farthest corner of Louisiana lies the nation's largest swamp - a hidden world where nature rules... and man fights back. The Cajuns that live in this forbidding environment follow a tradition dating back three hundred years - the thirty day alligator hunting season.

programme.title: Motorway Patrol
programme.desc: When the motorway gets backed up one driver offroads it, and a mini Mitzi meets a maxi truck in a hit and run.
programme.series-desc: Ride along with the officers who patrol the busiest roads in New Zealand: Auckland's motorways. From honest mistakes, near misses, terrible decisions and road rage flare-ups - we're on the front line as officers pick up the pieces.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: Love Is A Many Strangled Thing
programme.desc: Homer enrols in a fathering enrichment class, where he undergoes treatment to stop the urge to strangle Bart. S22 E17
programme.series-desc: Pop culture icons Homer, Marge, Bart, Lisa and Maggie are right at home on TVNZ 2. There's never a dull moment in Springfield!

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: When the Great Raymondo takes Lisa on as his magician's assistant, she is conned into revealing the secret of his greatest trick to his nemesis. S22 E18
programme.series-desc: Pop culture icons Homer, Marge, Bart, Lisa and Maggie are right at home on TVNZ 2. There's never a dull moment in Springfield!

programme.title: My Boyfriend Made Me Do It
programme.sub-title: My Boyfriend Made Me Do It
programme.desc: How Sofia faced two years in a Dubai jail after her boyfriend ripped her off. And the story of two teenagers who were sentenced to a total of 43 years in a notorious Bangkok prison.
programme.series-desc: Meet the women coerced or tricked by their partners into committing serious crimes. From smuggling kilos of cocaine to planning million-pound heists, hear from offenders and expert criminologists on how these crimes come about.

programme.title: Airport Security USA
programme.desc: In San Francisco officers find what they believe is a handgun in and a teenager who might be a victim of trafficking. In Honolulu over a million dollars of crystal meth is discovered.
programme.series-desc: Every day, millions of airline passengers travel into the United States. While not everyone is trying their luck, scrutiny uncovers all sorts of career drug smugglers and human traffickers to less serious visa and passport defaulters.

programme.title: Seized At Sea
programme.desc: A search party looking for a group of undocumented migrants hiding on an island turns into a medical emergency. Off Puerto Rico, a family’s boat springs a leak so AMO agents come to their assistance
programme.series-desc: Crews are embedded with U.S. Customs agents uncover the hidden world of smuggling — from well-established cartel operations to wild party boats returning from the Caribbean.

programme.title: Catch Me If You Can

programme.title: Turning Point
programme.desc: Infomercials
programme.series-desc:
Turning Point is an ABC News program that aired from 1994 to 1999.
Turning Point was an hour-long documentary program focused on a single topic, making it similar to CBS' 48 Hours, which it ran directly opposite for some of its run. The program tended toward sensational topics, such as former members of Charles Manson's "Family" and much coverage of the O. J. Simpson murder case, which was current for much of the program's run. ABC News figures appearing regularly on the program included Diane Sawyer, Forrest Sawyer, Meredith Vieira, Peter Jennings and Barbara Walters.
This Turning Point is not to be confused with an ABC dramatic anthology series of the same title which ran during the 1952-53 television season.

programme.title: Getaway
programme.desc: This week on Getaway, Catriona Rowntree continues her European river journey with a side trip to Cesky Krumlov before cruising through Southern Germany.
programme.series-desc:
Getaway is Australia's longest-running travel television program. Debuting on 14 May 1992, it is broadcast on the Nine Network and TLC. Its main competitor was The Great Outdoors on the Seven Network until 2009.
A New Zealand version of the program, with some local content, used to be broadcast on TV One and Prime TV.
The first season only looked at only Australian resorts and locations, but by 1993 had expanded to look at overseas destinations.

programme.title: This City Is Ours
programme.desc: Michael and Jamie's rivalry is pushed to the limit, causing Michael to reevaluate his life.

Schuller, who founded the program. It is broadcast from the Crystal Cathedral in Garden Grove, California. The program is normally one hour long, but some networks broadcast an edited 30 minute program. programme.desc: Premier League: Goal Rush centres on Tottenham v Burnley from Tottenham Hotspur Stadium, bringing updates from across the grounds. Catch every goal key moment and twist from Matchweek 1...
programme.series-desc: The Goal Rush was a live ITV television programme that aired from 2001 to 2003 produced by Granada Television. The programme was broadcast on Saturdays as a rival show to Final Score on BBC One, and provided live football scores from the Premier League and the Football League. ITV ran the programme during the two of the three seasons that it held the rights to show Premier League highlights. After the rights were lost, The Goal Rush was axed. Coverage began on ITV2 and then continued on ITV from 4pm. The programme was presented by Angus Scott.

programme.title: Suddenly Susan

programme.title: The 100K Drop
programme.desc: Contestants are given a stack of cash at the start of the game, and they must answer questions correctly to hold on to it. With each incorrect answer, money is lost through a trapdoor.
programme.series-desc:
The Million Pound Drop Live is a BAFTA-winning game show which broadcasts live on Channel 4 in the United Kingdom. The show began in May 2010 with Davina McCall having presented the show's eleven series to date.
The show uses social networking sites such as Facebook and Twitter to find contestants, and also to promote the show. David Flynn, managing director of Endemol's Remarkable Television, which produced the show, said: "The plan was to create buzz and an air of mystery around the show by trickling information about auditions via Twitter and Facebook, giving fans a level of exclusivity."

programme.desc: Drawing fire is fun, but playing with fire is a BIG no-no. Wait, what happens when Great Eraser brings this drawing to life?

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Brought to you by The Shopping Channel
programme.series-desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: The 100K Drop
programme.desc: Contestants are given a stack of cash at the start of the game, and they must answer questions correctly to hold on to it. With each incorrect answer, money is lost through a trapdoor.
programme.series-desc:
The Million Pound Drop Live is a BAFTA-winning game show which broadcasts live on Channel 4 in the United Kingdom. The show began in May 2010 with Davina McCall having presented the show's eleven series to date.
The show uses social networking sites such as Facebook and Twitter to find contestants, and also to promote the show. David Flynn, managing director of Endemol's Remarkable Television, which produced the show, said: "The plan was to create buzz and an air of mystery around the show by trickling information about auditions via Twitter and Facebook, giving fans a level of exclusivity."

programme.title: Rugby Nation‎

programme.series-desc: Join your host Taylor Curtis for the best highlights from the weekend’s rugby.

programme.title: Salvage Hunters
programme.desc: Modern day treasure hunter Drew Pritchard travels the length and breadth of the UK in search of weird and wonderful objects. The bigger the hoard, the happier he is.
programme.series-desc: Meet modern-day treasure hunter Drew Pritchard. With demanding customers, high turnover, and one of the biggest decorative salvage yards in the UK, Drew is constantly on the road, crisscrossing the country in search of derelict gems and forgotten remnants. Drew loves the thrill of the hunt and while he gets his hands dirty in the country's architectural backwaters, his crack team of restorers is back at the shop giving old and rare finds a new lease on life.

programme.title: Toy Hunter
programme.desc: Jordan sets his sights on Knoxville, Tennessee, to replenish his inventory. S1 E9
programme.series-desc: Toy Hunter is an American reality documentary television series on the Travel Channel that debuted August 15, 2012. The series encompasses the exploits of Jordan Hembrough, a toy dealer, who takes toy picking to a new level as he visits collections from some of the most popular cities on the East and West Coasts. In September 2012, Travel Channel announced the series' renewal for a second season, which consists of thirteen episodes. It airs in the United Kingdom and Ireland on Quest.

programme.title: Border Security
programme.desc: A suspicious package arrives at the mail centre from India, and an American surfer is taken ill in customs. Plus, an Indonesian family is carrying an unwanted visitor. S4 Ep4
programme.series-desc: The work of Australia's customs and immigration officials who protect their country from drug smugglers, illegal immigrants, potential terrorists, harmful pests and exotic diseases.

programme.title: Border Security
programme.desc: Australian border control agents monitor 20,000 travellers entering Australia each day. They protect the country from all kinds of threats, from smugglers to exotic diseases.
programme.series-desc: The work of Australia's customs and immigration officials who protect their country from drug smugglers, illegal immigrants, potential terrorists, harmful pests and exotic diseases.

programme.series-desc: 999: On the Front Line returns for a second series following the paramedic teams of the West Midlands Ambulance Service.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: Anne Burrell and Damaris Phillips team up to hassle, heckle and hope Bobby loses. They bring in Italian master chefs Ayaka Guido and Fabrizio Facchini.
programme.series-desc: Two talented chefs go head-to-head for the chance to Beat Bobby Flay. To get to Bobby the chefs must first face off against each other, creating a spectacular dish with a secret ingredient of Bobby's choice. Judges Alex Guarnaschelli and Jeff Mauro know Bobby's strengths and his weaknesses. Their goal: Pick the chef who has the skills to take down Bobby Flay in his own arena. The winning chef gets to challenge Bobby with his or her surprise signature dish. If Bobby goes down, the winner can tell the world, "I beat Bobby Flay!"

programme.title: Border Security Australia
programme.desc: Australian border control agents monitor 20,000 travellers entering Australia each day. They protect the country from all kinds of threats, from smugglers to exotic diseases.
programme.series-desc:
Border Security: Australia's Front Line is an Australian television program that airs on the Seven Network. The show follows the work of officers of Australian Customs and Border Protection, the Australian Quarantine and Inspection Service, and the Department of Immigration and Citizenship as they enforce Australian customs, quarantine, immigration and finance laws.
Most of the programme is filmed at Sydney and Melbourne airports. Occasionally, the program features other locations such as Brisbane Airport, Perth Airport, seaports, international mail centres, raids on workplaces suspected of employing persons contrary to the restrictions of their visa or immigrant status and the work of Customs vessels and aircraft in the waters of Northern Australia.

programme.series-desc: 999: On the Front Line returns for a second series following the paramedic teams of the West Midlands Ambulance Service.

programme.series-desc: Two talented chefs go head-to-head for the chance to Beat Bobby Flay. To get to Bobby the chefs must first face off against each other, creating a spectacular dish with a secret ingredient of Bobby's choice. Judges Alex Guarnaschelli and Jeff Mauro know Bobby's strengths and his weaknesses. Their goal: Pick the chef who has the skills to take down Bobby Flay in his own arena. The winning chef gets to challenge Bobby with his or her surprise signature dish. If Bobby goes down, the winner can tell the world, "I beat Bobby Flay!"

programme.title: Mysteries At The Museum
programme.desc: Don Wildman embarks on an epic quest to solve the world's greatest mysteries. From historical institutions to unexplored archives, Don unearths extraordinary relics and sinister artefacts.
programme.series-desc: Host Don Wildman unearths relics from the world's greatest institutions to reveal incredible secrets from the past. He examines each artifact to illuminate the hidden treasures.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible
programme.desc: Robert travels to Strongsville, Ohio, to rescue a dark, dirty and disgusting Tex-Mex restaurant. As well as having a lackadaisical owner they also don't cook real food. S2 Ep12
programme.series-desc: Chef Robert Irvine sets out to salvage restaurants on the verge of shutting down with just USD 10,000 and two days to help the owners get back into business.

programme.title: Salvage Hunters
programme.desc: Modern day treasure hunter Drew Pritchard travels the length and breadth of the UK in search of weird and wonderful objects. The bigger the hoard, the happier he is.
programme.series-desc: Meet modern-day treasure hunter Drew Pritchard. With demanding customers, high turnover, and one of the biggest decorative salvage yards in the UK, Drew is constantly on the road, crisscrossing the country in search of derelict gems and forgotten remnants. Drew loves the thrill of the hunt and while he gets his hands dirty in the country's architectural backwaters, his crack team of restorers is back at the shop giving old and rare finds a new lease on life.

programme.title: Mysteries At The Museum
programme.desc: Don Wildman embarks on an epic quest to solve the world's greatest mysteries. From historical institutions to unexplored archives, Don unearths extraordinary relics and sinister artefacts.
programme.series-desc: Host Don Wildman unearths relics from the world's greatest institutions to reveal incredible secrets from the past. He examines each artifact to illuminate the hidden treasures.

programme.title: Border Security
programme.desc: A suspicious package arrives at the mail centre from India, and an American surfer is taken ill in customs. Plus, an Indonesian family is carrying an unwanted visitor. S4 Ep4
programme.series-desc: The work of Australia's customs and immigration officials who protect their country from drug smugglers, illegal immigrants, potential terrorists, harmful pests and exotic diseases.

programme.title: Border Security Australia
programme.desc: Australian border control agents monitor 20,000 travellers entering Australia each day. They protect the country from all kinds of threats, from smugglers to exotic diseases.
programme.series-desc:
Border Security: Australia's Front Line is an Australian television program that airs on the Seven Network. The show follows the work of officers of Australian Customs and Border Protection, the Australian Quarantine and Inspection Service, and the Department of Immigration and Citizenship as they enforce Australian customs, quarantine, immigration and finance laws.
Most of the programme is filmed at Sydney and Melbourne airports. Occasionally, the program features other locations such as Brisbane Airport, Perth Airport, seaports, international mail centres, raids on workplaces suspected of employing persons contrary to the restrictions of their visa or immigrant status and the work of Customs vessels and aircraft in the waters of Northern Australia.

programme.title: Paramedics: On The Front Line
programme.desc: Paramedics treat a range of cases, including a man with severe chest pains, a 103-year-old who has had a fall and a woman who may have a bleed on the brain. S5 E1
programme.series-desc: 999: On the Front Line returns for a second series following the paramedic teams of the West Midlands Ambulance Service.

programme.title: Toy Hunter
programme.desc: Jordan sets his sights on Knoxville, Tennessee, to replenish his inventory. S1 E9
programme.series-desc: Toy Hunter is an American reality documentary television series on the Travel Channel that debuted August 15, 2012. The series encompasses the exploits of Jordan Hembrough, a toy dealer, who takes toy picking to a new level as he visits collections from some of the most popular cities on the East and West Coasts. programme.title: Selling Ireland's Most Exclusive Homes
programme.desc: The splendour of a ?10 million Palladian mega-mansion, a cool city pied-a-terre, an immaculate family home in Ireland's most prestigious postcode, a historic castle gate lodge and more. S1 E2
programme.series-desc: From country lodges to high-tech masterpieces, waterfront apartments to city centre penthouses, these incredible properties could be your dream ‘home sweet home’- if money was no object. Selling Ireland’s Most Exclusive Homes gives viewers a sneak peek behind the doors of Ireland’s multi-million mansions.

programme.title: Maryland
programme.desc: Mary's body is set to be repatriated, Richard arrives on The Isle of Man to ensure her return, but Mary's wish was to remain on The Island.
programme.series-desc: Becca and her sister, Rosaline, have forged ahead with family lives and careers, growing distant through time and circumstance. But when the body of an older woman is discovered at sunrise on Laxey Beach in the Isle of Man, it brings devastating news for the sisters.

programme.title: The 1% Percent Club
programme.desc: Comedy legend Lee Mack hosts the quiz show 'The 1% Club', where the questions are all about applying logic, reasoning skills and common sense. S2 E2
programme.series-desc: The 1% Club is a game show like no other! Unlike most quizzes, they don't need to brush up on general knowledge to do well. All they need is logic and common sense. Hosted by comedian Jim Jefferies.

programme.title: The Red King
programme.desc: With the True Way falsely accused of Cai's murder, Grace's investigation is blown
programme.series-desc: Smart, capable and by the book Grace Narayan was flying high as an inner-city police sergeant before being forced into a 'punishment posting' on the small, antiquated island of St. Jory. Confronted by the forgotten and unsolved case of missing teenage boy Cai, Grace quickly discovers that she must overcome scarce evidence, extraordinary local characters, and the island's strange cult history to uncover the truth.

programme.title: News Live
programme.desc: Up-to-date news and analysis from around the world.
programme.series-desc: A news show hosted by Kiryu Coco in which she summarizes the events of the day before. Coco-Kaichou often pitches products as commercial breaks such as her drug AsaCoco which can be inhaled, injected or consumed as a drink. It is tradition to watch Cocos AsaCoco Live News and afterwards Tsunomaki Watames "Watame no Uta" (early morning karaoke format with viewer rock-paper-scissor).

programme.title: Talk to Al Jazeera
programme.desc: One-on-one conversations with global leaders, icons, influencers and alternative voices shaping our times.
programme.series-desc:
Al Jazeera’s flagship interview show. A weekly one-on-one conversation with global leaders, icons, influencers, and alternative voices shaping our times.
We also interview the voiceless - individuals who by accident or choice find themselves in extraordinary events. On Talk to Al Jazeera - In the Field

programme.desc: Trump sees himself as a peacemaker who prefers "one and done" military solutions to permanent engagement with the world. Is it working?
programme.series-desc: The Bottom Line is a business discussion programme broadcast in the UK on BBC Radio 4 and the BBC News Channel, and internationally on the BBC World Service and BBC World News. It is co-production between BBC News and The Open University.

programme.title: The Stream
programme.desc: Today on the Stream: We look into why many women in the West are turning to the traditional stay-at-home lifestyle.
programme.series-desc:
The Stream is a daily television programme on Al Jazeera English. It is branded as a “Web community With a Global TV show”. On television and online The Stream taps into the extraordinary potential of social media to disseminate news. The Stream is an aggregator of online sources and discussion, seeking out unheard voices, new perspectives from people on the ground and untold angles related to the most compelling stories of the day.
Previously, the show was hosted by Derrick Ashong and Imran Garda. Lisa Fletcher replaced them as the new presenter. On June 25, 2012, the Stream was relaunched with a new studio and opening graphics. Femi Oke replaced Fletcher when Fletcher was picked to host a version of The Stream on Al Jazeera America.

programme.title: Witness
programme.desc: Inspirational and provocative stories providing a fresh and informative insight into the world's key events as they impact on the lives of ordinary people.
programme.series-desc: Yu Kyung is a successful woman who is proficient enough to become an executive director of Chunha Group when she started as a secretary. She recently found out her daughter is alive, so she plans to get her back and take her revenge. Meanwhile, Hye Soo is a strong girl who faces challenges head-on. She has a daughter with Ji Ho, and she would do anything for her. However, she gets tragically betrayed by Ji Ho, the love of her life, over power and money. How will those two mothers end their fierce revenge?

programme.title: Takaro Tribe
programme.desc: Join the Takaro Tribe as they sing and dance their way through their magical alphabet forest, meeting friends and whanau as they go.
programme.series-desc: The Tākaro Tribe is a whānau (family) of five cute, cuddly and friendly patupaiarehe (woodland fairies) who live in the enchanted and magical Wao Arapū (alphabet forest). Their names are A, E, I, O, U and they are sisters and brothers. In the forest, also lives their much loved Pāpā Rākau (Tree Father) and Kōkā (Pond Mother) along with many special animal and bird friends.

programme.title: Hour Of Power
programme.desc: Religious Programme.
programme.series-desc: Hour of Power is a weekly American Christian television program. It was previously hosted by Sheila Schuller Coleman, her brother, Robert A. Schuller, and her father, Robert H. Schuller, who founded the program. It is broadcast from the Crystal Cathedral in Garden Grove, California. The program is normally one hour long, but some networks broadcast an edited 30 minute program. It features a large congregation, mostly Christian music with a choir and guests who speak about how God and their Christian faith have changed their lives for the better.

programme.title: Premier League: Goal Rush‎
programme.sub-title: : Pl Goal Rush: Mw1 Tottenham Hotspur V Burnley
programme.desc: Premier League: Goal Rush centres on Tottenham v Burnley from Tottenham Hotspur Stadium, bringing updates from across the grounds. Catch every goal key moment and twist from Matchweek 1...
programme.series-desc: The Goal Rush was a live ITV television programme that aired from 2001 to 2003 produced by Granada Television. The programme was broadcast on Saturdays as a rival show to Final Score on BBC One, and provided live football scores from the Premier League and the Football League. ITV ran the programme during the two of the three seasons that it held the rights to show Premier League highlights. After the rights were lost, The Goal Rush was axed. Coverage began on ITV2 and then continued on ITV from 4pm. The programme was presented by Angus Scott.
